deals.name: General Magic
deals.notes: AI agents for insurance via SMS/iMessage/RCS. Led by Radical Ventures, a16z speedrun. Quote times from 30min to <3min.

deals.name: Baba Technologies
deals.notes: Smart glasses for people with dysarthria/motor impairments. Founded by ALS caregivers. Early stage, building first prototype. hello@babatech.io

deals.name: Schematik
deals.notes: Hardware dev platform — describe electronics in plain English, generates code + wiring diagrams. Supports Arduino/ESP32/RPi. Beta. Based in Europe. @samuelbeek

deals.name: Sky Valley
deals.notes: Adaptive software exoskeleton — answering 'how do I make my software adaptive?' Originally positioned around capturing developer intent, now refocusing on differentiation. Looking to hire design engineers and invest in brand. Product: getdiffer.com | Deck: https://deck.skyvalley.ac/deck/bggt_lgDLI-d | Data room: https://deck.skyvalley.ac/r/bggt_lgDLI-d | Product doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/14tfS7PENfOq3V5izCt7lTEzT-_CmEkQ30RWhrVqm0OU/edit | iris@skyvalley.ac, noam@skyvalley.ac

deals.name: Inflight
deals.contact: Kyle Barber, Veer Gadodia, Michael Riddering
deals.notes: AI-native feedback platform for product teams — get quality feedback from peers, users, investors in hours not days. South Park Commons. Founders: Kyle Barber (ex-Airchat/Facebook/Tinder design), Veer Gadodia (MIT CS, ex-Airchat, AI/distributed systems), Michael Riddering (creator of Dive & Figma Academy, founding designer at Maven). Backed by Kindred Ventures. inflight.co

deals.name: Courtroom
deals.notes: AI-powered courtroom simulation for litigation teams. Two products: Juries AI (simulate jurors for case strategy) and Judges AI (battle-test briefs against simulated sitting judges). Claims 82.1% accuracy. Serves AmLaw 10/50/100/200 firms. Founded by Big Law alumni. courtroom.ai

people.name: Minqi Jiang
people.notes: Open-ended AI + RL researcher. Previously UCL CS + Meta FAIR, now Google DeepMind. Published Generative Data Refinement, JaxMARL, Rainbow Teaming. Based in Oxford. minch.co | @MinqiJiang

people.name: Ali Partovi
people.notes: Founded Neo in 2017. Harvard CS. Early investor in Facebook, Cursor, Kalshi, Bluesky. Twin brother of Hadi Partovi (Code.org). Neo Residency program: $750K uncapped SAFE, 3-month SF workspace, Oregon bootcamp. Portfolio includes Cursor ($30B), Cognition ($4B), Pika Labs ($700M), Moment, Anterior. neo.com | @apartovi

people.name: Suzanne Xie
people.notes: Partner at Neo alongside Ali Partovi and Emily Cohen. Runs Neo Scholars program ($20K grants for gap semesters, no equity).

people.name: Emily Cohen
people.notes: Partner at Neo alongside Ali Partovi and Suzanne Xie. Writes Neo News (neo.substack.com). Runs Neo Scholars and Neo Residency programs.
